ocr_findings.description: Section icon bullets '○●' rendered as '○●' in OCR — consistent cosmetic approximation, no content impact.
Image caption '● ルーター' rendered as '■ ルーター' — bullet style difference only.

reviewer_notes: Page covers router and default gateway concepts including an SDN sidebar. All body text, bullet comparisons (hub vs router roles), and sidebar content are faithfully captured. No meaningful content loss.
